presentation.latex: t=1.InfMemmaintains a bounded memory statem t (a token sequence) with a fixed budget|m t| ≤M. After reading each chunk, the agent updates its memory by selectively overwriting an older entry, keeping the per-step context size constant and ensuring end-to-end complexity linear inT.

presentation.latex: j=1 (e.g., paragraphs) from the same document. Unlike the coarse streaming chunks, these units are compact and globally indexed. When triggered by PRETHINK,InfMem can jump to any part of the document (past or future) to retrieve the top-kt units and summarize them into a concise context rt, while preserving the coarse-grained reading flow.
